race.description: Lyn Mcpherson Breed For Speed Bronze Fnl Mbl Trot
race.comment: SKY LINDY (5) is in a purple patch of form having come from one spot wider to make it three wins in a row last start at Bendigo, racing parked before getting home by 2.2 metres. Has built a consistent record at this distance. Big chance again. LITTLE MISS MORGAN (10) has been good from this row in both starts since a spell, cruising home by 17m first up before finishing 2.2m behind SKY LINDY last week. Peaking third up so is a chance to turn the tables. MANDA KYVALLEY (4) raced wide and broke last start so forget that result. Had come from wider barriers than this for a win and a second in the previous two outings so is worth another chance. THE SKY IS THE LIMIT (8) draws for a trail and can continue the consistent form.
